subcodes.first_line: The Self-Sufficient One speaketh: O My handmaiden and daughter of My handmaiden! Hearken unto My call. Praise be unto God for His mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بینیاز میفرماید ای کنیز من و فرزند کنیز من ندایم را بشنو الحمد لله از رحمت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @knowledge; recognition of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @scarcity of receptive souls, @service to others; to the Cause of God
